description:
The campus page (src/pages/CampusPage.tsx) has two flanking pennant banners absolutely positioned over its hero area, rendered via CampusBannerSVG (which loads /images/banners/campus-banner.svg). The user provided three new banner SVGs that are drop-in replacements (same 122.72×368.16 viewBox, same V-notch pennant shape):

- /Users/fractalos/Desktop/events-banner-final.svg
- /Users/fractalos/Desktop/visit-banner-final.svg
- /Users/fractalos/Desktop/education-banner-final.svg

Goal: replicate the campus banner pattern on three pages — same placement/sizing/styling:
- EventsPage.tsx → events banner
- NeighborhoodPage.tsx → visit banner
- LiberalArtsPage.tsx → education banner

Why: visual brand consistency across house pages.
title: Add flanking pennant banners to events, visit, and education pages
